description: Zen7 operates a decentralized AI-agent protocol project and also runs PetPals, an online pet supplies marketplace available on the web and as a ChatGPT app. The publicly verifiable developer integration surface on zen7.com is the PetPals MCP endpoint hosted at platform.zen7.com.
summary: Zen7 exposes a public MCP server for PetPals at `https://platform.zen7.com/mcp`, authenticated with OAuth.
